stemHtml: When undertaking a simulated instrument flight, in accordance with ICAO Annex 2, Rules of the Air, what specific requirements are applicable? The aircraft shall be equipped with…

options.a: two complete sets of flight controls, and a qualified pilot acting as a safety pilot shall occupy one of the control seats. The safety pilot shall have 360° vision around the aircraft.
options.b: dual controls, and a pilot acting as a safety pilot shall occupy one of the control seats.
options.c: a complete set of flight instruments at each control seat, and a qualified Flight Instructor must occupy one of these seats.
options.d: a complete set of flight instruments at each control seat, and a pilot with an instrument rating.
